# Attestix

> Attestation Infrastructure for AI Agents. Cryptographic proof your AI agents are compliant with the EU AI Act.

Attestix provides verifiable identity, W3C credentials, delegation chains, compliance declarations, provenance tracking, reputation scoring, and Base L2 testnet anchoring for autonomous AI agents. 47 MCP tools across 9 modules. 585 passing tests (494 functional + 91 RFC / W3C conformance benchmarks). Apache 2.0. Stable 0.4.1; single-maintainer project; no independent third-party security audit yet.

## Marketing

- [Home](https://attestix.io): Landing with hero, problem, modules, workflow, validation, framework integrations, use cases, benchmarks, compliance matrix
- [Interactive Console](https://attestix.io/console): Live preview of the Attestix workspace with agents, credentials, audit trail, anchors
- [Book a demo](https://attestix.io/demo-call): Request a 30-minute live walkthrough
- [Pricing](https://attestix.io/pricing): Open Source (free) and Enterprise tiers
- [FAQ](https://attestix.io/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Community](https://attestix.io/community): GitHub, contributing, resources
- [Blog](https://attestix.io/blog): Release notes and field reports
- [Research](https://attestix.io/research): Paper abstract, contributions, evaluation
- [Changelog](https://attestix.io/changelog): v0.1.0 through v0.4.1 release history
- [Verify a credential](https://attestix.io/verify): Client-side W3C Verifiable Credential verifier — paste or drop a VC and check its Ed25519 signature, structure, and validity window entirely in-browser via the @vibetensor/attestix npm package. Nothing uploaded; no backend. By-id deep link form is /verify?id=<credential-id> (by-id resolution itself is an Attestix Cloud feature). Live revocation not checked offline.
- [Security](https://attestix.io/security): Responsible disclosure, CVE process
- [SBOM](https://attestix.io/sbom): Software bill of materials with licenses
- [United Kingdom](https://attestix.io/uk): UK geo-landing — FCA, ICO, Bank of England framings for AI-Act-grade evidence
- [India](https://attestix.io/india): India geo-landing — DPDP, RBI, MeitY, DPI framings; VibeTensor incorporation note

## Specifications

- [Bundle wire format v1](https://attestix.io/spec/bundle/v1): Frozen v1 specification of the portability bundle wire format — manifest schema, per-table layout, verifier algorithm, security model. Dereferenceable identifier the `attestix_bundle_format` field in every Attestix bundle points to.

## Docs

- [Overview](https://attestix.io/docs): Project overview and quick start
- [Getting Started](https://attestix.io/docs/getting-started): Installation and first agent identity in 5 minutes
- [Quickstart index](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart): 10 per-ICP-persona quickstart pages, copy-paste path in 90 seconds
- [Quickstart / Indie dev](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/indie-dev): LangChain RAG agent with hash-chained audit + auto-issued VC
- [Quickstart / Fintech compliance](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/fintech-compliance): Trading / credit-scoring agent with Article 10/11/43 records
- [Quickstart / Healthcare ML](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/healthcare-ml): Clinical decision-support agent with Annex III high-risk profile (GDPR Art. 17 only; DPDP planned for v0.5)
- [Quickstart / Enterprise architect](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/enterprise-architect): Self-hosted REST + MCP service with tenant context and idempotency
- [Quickstart / GRC consultant](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/grc-consultant): Annex IV / Annex V evidence bundle for a client; de-conflates integrity vs. conformity
- [Quickstart / DevTools skeptic](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/devtools-skeptic): 60-second smoke test that the package imports cleanly from a fresh venv
- [Quickstart / Web3 on-chain](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/web3-onchain): EAS anchor on Base Sepolia testnet with schema UID + gas estimate
- [Quickstart / AI safety research](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/ai-safety-research): Signed, hash-chained agent telemetry from an eval run
- [Quickstart / Startup CTO](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/startup-cto): 5-minute build-vs-buy proof across identity + audit + delegation + compliance
- [Quickstart / MLOps engineer](https://attestix.io/docs/quickstart/mlops-engineer): Pinned-version CI step that records model lineage and issues a promotion VC
- [Examples](https://attestix.io/docs/examples): Runnable code examples for all modules
- [EU AI Act Compliance](https://attestix.io/docs/guides/eu-ai-act-compliance): Full compliance workflow with checklists
- [EU Compliance Walkthrough](https://attestix.io/docs/guides/eu-compliance-walkthrough): Step-by-step pipeline
- [Risk Classification](https://attestix.io/docs/guides/risk-classification): Decision tree for AI Act risk categories
- [Integration Guide](https://attestix.io/docs/guides/integration-guide): LangChain, OpenAI Agents SDK, CrewAI, plain Python
- [Reputation Scoring](https://attestix.io/docs/guides/reputation): Trust scoring, categories, recency decay
- [npm rename migration](https://attestix.io/docs/guides/migration-npm-rename): @vibetensor/attestix → attestix (bare name on npm, matches pip install attestix)
- [API Reference](https://attestix.io/docs/reference/api-reference): All 47 tools with parameters and return types
- [Concepts](https://attestix.io/docs/reference/concepts): UAIT, DID, VC, VP, UCAN, Ed25519 explained
- [Configuration](https://attestix.io/docs/reference/configuration): Environment variables and setup
- [FAQ](https://attestix.io/docs/reference/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Glossary](https://attestix.io/docs/reference/glossary): Terms and acronyms
- [Troubleshooting](https://attestix.io/docs/reference/troubleshooting): Common errors and solutions
- [Roadmap](https://attestix.io/docs/project/roadmap): Development phases and timeline
- [Changelog](https://attestix.io/docs/project/changelog): Version history
- [Contributing](https://attestix.io/docs/project/contributing): How to contribute
- [Research (docs)](https://attestix.io/docs/project/research): Mirror of /research

## Modules

- Identity: 8 tools for Unified Agent Identity Tokens (UAITs), GDPR Article 17 erasure
- Agent Cards: 3 tools for A2A-compatible agent card generation and discovery
- DID: 3 tools for W3C Decentralized Identifiers (did:key, did:web, resolution)
- Delegation: 4 tools for UCAN-style capability delegation with signed JWT tokens
- Reputation: 3 tools for recency-weighted trust scoring with category breakdown
- Compliance: 7 tools for EU AI Act risk profiles, conformity assessments, Annex V declarations
- Credentials: 8 tools for W3C Verifiable Credentials with Ed25519Signature2020
- Provenance: 5 tools for training data provenance, model lineage, hash-chained audit trail
- Blockchain: 6 tools for anchoring artifact hashes to Base L2 testnet via EAS

## Standards

- W3C Verifiable Credentials Data Model 1.1
- W3C Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs) v1.0
- UCAN (User Controlled Authorization Networks) v0.9.0
- Ed25519 digital signatures (RFC 8032)
- JSON Canonicalization Scheme (RFC 8785)
- RFC 6962 Merkle tree
- EU AI Act (Articles 5, 9-15, 43, 72, 73, Annex III, Annex V)
- GDPR Article 17
- Ethereum Attestation Service (EAS) on Base L2 testnet
- Model Context Protocol (MCP) 1.8+
- Google A2A Agent-to-Agent Protocol
- ERC-8004 agent identity
- IEEE 7000 algorithmic transparency
- ISO/IEC 42001 AIMS

## Framework integrations

- LangChain (production, BaseCallbackHandler)
- OpenAI Agents SDK (production, MCPServerStdio)
- CrewAI (production, MCPServerAdapter)
- Dify (example, via MCP)
- Google ADK (example, via MCP)
- Semantic Kernel (example, via MCP plugin)
- Strands (example, via MCP runtime)

## Install

```
pip install attestix
```

JS/TS verifier (same canonical-JSON form + Ed25519 verification):

```
npm install attestix
```

The scoped npm name `@vibetensor/attestix` is deprecated; install the bare `attestix` package (matches `pip install attestix`).

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/VibeTensor/attestix
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/attestix/
- MCP Registry: io.github.VibeTensor/attestix
- Website: https://attestix.io
- Paper: https://attestix.io/research
